steps.title: Translate percentages into equations
steps.content:
Since $a$ is 3900% of $c$, we have $$a = \frac{3900}{100}c = 39c.$$
Because $c$ is 25% of $b$, we have $$c = \frac{25}{100}b = 0.25b,$$ which gives $$b = \frac{c}{0.25} = 4c.$$

steps.title: Find w by substituting into a-b = wc
steps.content:
Substitute the expressions for $a$ and $b$: $$a - b = 39c - 4c = 35c.$$
Since $a - b = wc$, we have $$wc = 35c$$ and, because $c>0$, $$w = 35.$$
The answer is 35.
